title: <li>1.1.c     | Draft nonprofit bylaws                                      | 1
content:
• 1.1.c | Draft nonprofit bylaws | 1 hr | 1 hr | 2025-04-25
  • 1.1.d | Hold inaugural board meeting; adopt bylaws | 30 min | 30 min | 2025-04-25
  • 1.2.a | Submit IRS Form 1023-EZ via Pay.gov | 1 hr | 2–4 weeks | 2025-04-26z
  • 1.2.b | Begin Florida Sales‐Tax Exemption (Form DR-5) | 45 min | 2–4 weeks (post-IRS letter) | 2025-04-26
  • 1.2.c | Note next steps: FDACS charity reg, bank setup, grant map | 15 min | 15 min | 2025-04-26
  • 1.3.b | Download EIN confirmation letter | 15 min | immediate | 2025-04-27
  • 1.3.c | Open organizational bank account | 1 hr | immediate | 2025-04-27
  • 1.4.a | Prepare DR-5 final packet; await IRS letter | 45 min | immediate (once letter in) | 2025-04-28
  • 1.4.b | Log all reference numbers in setup doc | 30 min | 30 min | 2025-04-28
